hero.description: Your cargo. Our network. Zero worries. The strength of a global network with the reliability of a local Mauritanian logistics leader.

about.title: Who We Are
about.subtitle: taklalog – Complete Logistics Solutions from Port to Door.
about.p1: We are a modern transportation and logistics company established in Mauritania with one clear goal: to redefine the meaning of road freight. We started with a simple vision — to be the partner who ensures every shipment arrives on time, in perfect condition, and with the highest level of professionalism.
about.p2: Today, taklalog has grown into a trusted name thanks to our modern fleet of trucks equipped with the latest GPS tracking technology, a professional 24/7 team, and a wide road network covering Nouakchott, all Mauritanian states, and neighboring countries.
about.p3: Whether you need to transport commercial goods, construction materials, or special shipments — we deliver with complete trust and peace of mind.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.desc: To become the leading name in land logistics across West Africa by combining cutting-edge technology with the traditional values of honesty, precision, and speed.

values.title: Our Values
values.trustDesc: Every shipment we carry is treated as a sacred trust.
values.profDesc: Highly trained drivers and trucks that meet international safety standards.
values.speedDesc: Precise schedules — because your time is your most valuable asset.
values.innovDesc: Real-time tracking via mobile app, automated reports, and custom solutions.

why.title: Why Choose taklalog?
why.f2: Complete coverage across Mauritania and beyond
why.f5: Customer support team that speaks your language
why.footer: taklalog is not just a trucking company… It is the peace of mind you need to sleep well knowing your cargo is in safe hands.

partners.title: Our Partners
partners.subtitle: taklalog – Powered by the world’s leading shipping giants.
partners.desc1: We are proud to partner with the most prestigious and famous shipping companies globally: Maersk, CMA CGM, MSC, ARKAS Line, and Hapag-Lloyd.
partners.desc2: These powerful strategic partnerships allow us to offer complete door-to-door and multimodal logistics solutions.
partners.desc3: We combine our modern Mauritanian truck fleet with their global sea freight networks to ensure your shipments travel seamlessly from any port in the world straight to your warehouse — faster, safer, and with full transparency.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Complete Logistics Solutions from Port to Door.
services.s2F3: Fast clearance at ports and borders
services.s2F4: Expert handling of tariffs and permits

footer.text: taklalog - Redefining the meaning of road freight.
